title: show true fov
description: Are you tired of Minecraft showing "Normal" and "Quake Pro" FOV. And not knowing what FOV it actually is. Well you've came to the right place!
body:
**Are you tired of Minecraft showing "_Normal_ " and "_Quake Pro_ " FOV. And not knowing what FOV it actually is. Well you've came to the right place!**

or wrong who knows...

**DISCLAIMER: only works when you have English (US) set as the language!**

(mostly 'cause im lazy)
